STATIC_DISCHARGE_C.description: Whenever you receive unblocked attack damage, Channel {StaticDischarge:diff()} [gold]Lightning[/gold].
STEAM_BARRIER_C.title: Steam Barrier
STEAM_BARRIER_C.description: Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold]. Decrease this card's [gold]Block[/gold] by 1 this combat.
STORM_OF_STEEL_C.title: Storm of Steel
STORM_OF_STEEL_C.description:
Discard your hand.
Add 1 Shiv into your hand for each card discarded.
STORM_C.title: Storm
STORM_C.description: Whenever you play a [gold]Power card[/gold], Channel {Storm:diff()} [gold]Lightning[/gold].
STREAMLINE_C.title: Streamline
STREAMLINE_C.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Reduce this card's cost by 1 this combat.

STRIKE_SILENT_C.title: Strike

Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.

SURVIVOR_C.title: Survivor
SWEEPING_BEAM_C.title: Sweeping Beam

Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
Draw {Cards:diff()} card.
SWIFT_STRIKE_C.title: Swift Strike
SWORD_BOOMERANG_C.title: Sword Boomerang
SWORD_BOOMERANG_C.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy {Repeat:diff()} times.
TACTICIAN_C.title: Tactician

Unplayable.
If this card is discarded from your hand, gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
TEMPEST_C.title: Tempest
TERROR_C.title: Terror
THE_BOMB_C.title: The Bomb
THE_BOMB_C.description: At the end of 3 turns, deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
THINKING_AHEAD_C.title: Thinking Ahead
THINKING_AHEAD_C.description:
Draw 2 cards.
Put a card from your hand on top of your draw pile.
THUNDER_CLAP_C.title: Thunderclap
THUNDER_CLAP_C.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage and apply 1 [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] to ALL enemies.
THUNDER_STRIKE_C.title: Thunder Strike
THUNDER_STRIKE_C.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to a random enemy for each [gold]Lightning[/gold] Channeled this combat.
TOOLS_OF_THE_TRADE_C.title: Tools of the Trade
TOOLS_OF_THE_TRADE_C.description: At the start of your turn, draw 1 card and discard 1 card.
TRANSMUTATION_C.title: Transmutation
TRANSMUTATION_C.description: Add X random Colorless cards into your hand. They cost 0 this turn.

TRUE_GRIT_C.title: True Grit
TURBO_C.title: TURBO
TURBO_C.description:
Gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(2)}.
Add a Void into your discard pile.
TWIN_STRIKE_C.title: Twin Strike
UNLOAD_C.title: Unload
UNLOAD_C.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Discard all non-[gold]Attack[/gold] cards in your hand.
UPPERCUT_C.title: Uppercut
VIOLENCE_C.title: Violence
VIOLENCE_C.description: Put {Cards:diff()} random Attacks from your draw pile into your hand.
WARCRY_C.title: Warcry
WARCRY_C.description:
Draw {Cards:diff()} card.
Put a card from your hand onto the top of your draw pile.
WARCRY_C.selectionScreenPrompt: Place a card on top of the draw pile
WELL_LAID_PLANS_C.title: Well-Laid Plans
WELL_LAID_PLANS_C.description: At the end of your turn, Retain up to {RetainAmount:diff()} card.
WHIRLWIND_C.title: Whirlwind
WHIRLWIND_C.description: Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies X times.
WHITE_NOISE_C.title: White Noise
WHITE_NOISE_C.description:
Add a random [gold]Power card[/gold] into your hand.
It costs 0 this turn.
WILD_STRIKE_C.title: Wild Strike
WILD_STRIKE_C.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Shuffle a Wound into your draw pile.
WRAITH_FORM_C.title: Wraith Form
WRAITH_FORM_C.description:
Gain {IntangiblePower:diff()} [gold]Intangible[/gold].
At the end of your turn, lose 1 [gold]Dexterity[/gold].

HEXAGHOST_BURN_PLUS.title: Burn+

Deal {Damage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
